national_coordination_en: A coordination team and technical partners were debriefed after a mission to a recently affected health zone. The INSP Director-General held a press conference with local media on positive rumour management, safe and dignified burial practices, referral of symptomatic individuals to facilities, and the importance of an Ebola Treatment Centre. A joint mission was sent to another health zone to evaluate continuity of care in healthcare facilities. An Incident Management System meeting took place at the Provincial Health Division to review epidemic developments and operational priorities.
summary_json: {"summary": " A joint mission was sent to another health zone to evaluate continuity of care in healthcare facilities . An Incident Management System meeting took place at the Provincial Health Division to review epidemic developments and operational priorities ."}

national_coordination_en: Continued support was provided to affected provinces under the leadership of the Incident Manager and IMS members based in Bunia, Ituri. A meeting was held with technical and financial partners to orient the response based on risk-analysis prioritisation. A total of 345 alerts were raised, with 322 investigated (93.3%). There were 117 suspected cases registered: 60.3% in North Kivu, 38.8% in Ituri, and 0.9% in South Kivu. For contact tracing, 5,040 contacts were under follow-up, of which 2,535 (50.3%) were seen.
